fields.name: controlId
fields.label: Control or Safeguard
fields.description: Enter a control identifier, safeguard ID, or category name to generate an evidence checklist.

fields.name: auditType
fields.label: Audit Type
fields.description: Optional audit mode or evidence period to tailor the checklist.

fields.name: export
fields.label: Export Format
fields.description: Choose the format for the generated evidence checklist.

reportDir.label: Output Directory
reportDir.description: Optional directory where the evidence checklist output should be written.
